div.p: Split-Brain Prevention: Only the side with ≥ quorum can elect a new primary. The minority side must remain in read-only mode or shut down.

ul.li: Majority side: Chooses Availability (A) Continues accepting writes.
Minority side: Chooses Consistency (C) Blocks writes to prevent data divergence. Key Insight: Quorum ensures exactly ONE active primary per cluster.

div.p: Status: 2/3 Up Quorum: ✓ MET (2 ≥ 2) → Failover PROCEEDS
Status: 1/3 Up Quorum: ✗ LOST (1 < 2) → Cluster HALTS
